expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜子的板材尺寸。[宽度], [高度], [深度] 是总尺寸，[板材厚度] 是顶板、底板和侧板的板材厚度，[背板厚度] 是背板的板材厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ialah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan untuk papan atas, bawah, dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah, dan samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือขนาดรวม, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของแผ่นวัสดุของแผ่นบน, ล่าง และข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของแผ่นวัสดุแผ่นพื้นหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính kích thước ván cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của ván trên, dưới và bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của ván sau. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinukwenta ang mga sukat ng tabla para sa kabinet. Ang [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay ang kabuuang sukat, ang [BoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal ng Itaas, Ibaba, at tagiliran ng tabla, at ang [BackBoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal ng tabla sa likod. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: အပ်ိုးမ်ားအတြင္းတြင္ကန္႔သတ္ခ်ိန္ဆြဲျခင္း။[Width],[Height],[Depth]shaller။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាដុំសម្រាប់ធ្វើទូ។ [Width], [Height], [Depth] គឺជា ចំនួនសរុប, [BoardThick] គឺជា កម្រាស់វត្ថុធាតុដើម ធ្នឹមលើ, ខាងក្រោម, និងផ្នែកចំហៀង, [BackBoardThick] គឺជា កម្រាស់វត្ថុធាតុដើម ធ្នឹមខាងក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ສໍາຫຼັບລາຢລາຍວະສ😔.[ສູງ].DataSourceListingError.[WidthD
remarks.ja: キャビネットのための板のサイズを計算します。[幅], [高さ], [奥行] は全体の寸法を表し、[板厚] は天板、底板、側板の板材の厚さ、[バックボード厚] は背面板の板材の厚さです。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛의 판재 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 총 측정치이며, [BoardThick]는 상단, 하단 및 측면 판재 두께이고, [BackBoardThick]는 배경 판재 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de las tablas para un gabinete. [Width], [Height], [Depth] son dimensiones totales, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material para las tablas superior, inferior y lateral, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material para el fondo. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des planches pour un meuble. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sont les dimensions totales, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau des planches supérieure, inférieure et latérales, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau de la planche arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Brettgrößen für ein Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sind die Gesamtabmessungen, [BoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der oberen, unteren und seitlichen Bretter, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialstärke des Rückwandbretts. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: एक कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड के आकार की गणना करें। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप होता है, [BoardThick] शीर्ष, नीचे और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] पृष्ठभूमि बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Вычисляет размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] - это общие размеры, [BoardThick] - толщина материала для верхней, нижней и боковых досок, [BackBoardThick] - толщина материала для задней доски. (AI translated, please check)
